headline: What Freeport-McMoRan (FCX)'s New Performance-Tied Dividend and Board Change Means For Shareholders
summary: Freeport-McMoRan recently declared a US$0.15 per-share cash dividend for common stockholders, split between a US$0.075 base and US$0.075 variable payment, payable on May 1, 2026, and also disclosed that long-serving director Robert W. Dudley will not stand for re-election at the 2026 annual meeting. At the same time, expectations for a very large year-over-year earnings increase and strong analyst sentiment are sharpening the focus on how Freeport-McMoRan’s performance-based payout framework...
